requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility of Power Tools: Philippine Expectations Versus China GB 4343 and GB 17799
requirement_topic.zh: 电动工具电磁兼容：菲律宾要求对比中国GB 4343和GB 17799
requirement_topic.zht: 電動工具電磁相容：菲律賓要求對比中國GB 4343和GB 17799

summary.en: Universal-motor power tools generate conducted and radiated emissions, so the Philippine technical file should address electromagnetic compatibility against the CISPR 14 family (CISPR 14-1 emission and CISPR 14-2 immunity), which the relevant PNS standards adopt. Where the tool is within BPS mandatory scope, EMC test evidence supports the PS or ICC application; where it is not, EMC remains good practice and may be required if the product contains a radio module subject to NTC type approval. The exporter should confirm the exact PNS or IEC reference BPS expects for the specific tool.
summary.zh: 通用电机电动工具产生传导和辐射骚扰，故菲律宾技术文件应依据CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1发射与CISPR 14-2抗扰度，相关PNS标准予以采用）处理电磁兼容。若工具落入BPS强制范围，EMC检测证据支持PS或ICC申请；若不落入，EMC仍属良好实践，且若产品含须经NTC型号核准的无线电模块则可能被要求。出口商应确认BPS对该具体工具所期望的确切PNS或IEC引用。
summary.zht: 通用電機電動工具產生傳導和輻射騷擾，故菲律賓技術文件應依據CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1發射與CISPR 14-2抗擾度，相關PNS標準予以採用）處理電磁相容。若工具落入BPS強制範圍，EMC檢測證據支持PS或ICC申請；若不落入，EMC仍屬良好實踐，且若產品含須經NTC型號核准的無線電模組則可能被要求。出口商應確認BPS對該具體工具所期望的確切PNS或IEC引用。

standards_or_laws: PNS adoption of CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) for household and similar electrical apparatus and tools
EMC evidence supporting a BPS PS or ICC application where the tool is in scope
NTC type approval where the tool contains an intentional radio transmitter

summary.en: Chinese power tools commonly carry EMC evidence to GB 4343.1 (emission) and GB 4343.2 (immunity) for household appliances and electric tools, along with GB 17799 series immunity references, which are national adoptions of the CISPR 14 and IEC 61000 families. These reports are technically close to what the Philippines expects but are issued under Chinese conformity arrangements, not under a BPS PS or ICC licence.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具通常依据GB 4343.1（发射）和GB 4343.2（抗扰度）以及GB 17799系列抗扰度引用持有EMC证据，这些是CISPR 14和IEC 61000系列的国家采标。此类报告在技术上与菲律宾要求接近，但系按中国合格评定安排出具，并非依据BPS PS或ICC许可。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具通常依據GB 4343.1（發射）和GB 4343.2（抗擾度）以及GB 17799系列抗擾度引用持有EMC證據，這些是CISPR 14和IEC 61000系列的國家採標。此類報告在技術上與菲律賓要求接近，但係按中國合格評定安排出具，並非依據BPS PS或ICC許可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 and GB 4343.2 (China adoption of CISPR 14-1 and CISPR 14-2)

gap.en: Because GB 4343 and the PNS CISPR 14 references share a common IEC origin, the test methods usually align, but the exporter should confirm that the laboratory and report format are acceptable to BPS and that the report covers the actual tool configuration sold in the Philippines. If the tool integrates a wireless module, EMC alone is insufficient and a separate NTC radio type approval must be planned.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343与PNS的CISPR 14引用同源于IEC，检测方法通常一致，但出口商应确认实验室和报告格式被BPS接受，且报告覆盖在菲律宾销售的实际工具配置。若工具集成无线模块，仅有EMC不足，须另行规划NTC无线电型号核准。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343與PNS的CISPR 14引用同源於IEC，檢測方法通常一致，但出口商應確認實驗室和報告格式被BPS接受，且報告覆蓋在菲律賓銷售的實際工具配置。若工具整合無線模組，僅有EMC不足，須另行規劃NTC無線電型號核准。

mandatory_status.target: EMC evidence is typically required as part of the PS or ICC dossier where the tool is in BPS scope; NTC type approval is mandatory for any intentional radio transmitter in the tool
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1 conducted and radiated emission limits are mandatory for products within the CCC catalogue; otherwise applied as national standards

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards, Department of Trade and Industry (Philippines)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 4343 and GB 17799 EMC reports usually share IEC test methods with the Philippine CISPR 14 references, but the exporter should confirm laboratory acceptance by BPS, matching product configuration, and a separate NTC radio approval if a wireless module is present.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 4343和GB 17799的EMC报告通常与菲律宾CISPR 14引用共享IEC检测方法，但出口商应确认BPS对实验室的接受、产品配置一致，以及若含无线模块时单独的NTC无线电核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 4343和GB 17799的EMC報告通常與菲律賓CISPR 14引用共享IEC檢測方法，但出口商應確認BPS對實驗室的接受、產品配置一致，以及若含無線模組時單獨的NTC無線電核准。
